rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly examined the argument chain, identifying and fixing multiple inconsistencies such as the misuse of 'doubly-robust' terminology and clarifying policy optimality claims.

rationale.RX.3: The output strictly adhered to the agreed scope without any deviations, ensuring all revisions were relevant and focused.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors were introduced; instead, the agent corrected potential issues from the original abstract.
